stratagem.name: DAT’S OURS
stratagem.lore: A few Orks, particularly those of the Blood Axe Clan, can resist their destructive urges long enough to prioritise the seizing of objectives.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagem.name: FIGHT PROPPA
stratagem.lore: Some deviant Blood Axes go so far as to practise hand‑to‑hand combat, tailoring fighting styles to specific types of enemies.
stratagem.target: One Orks Infantry or Orks Mounted unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

stratagem.name: TAKTIKAL RETREAT
stratagem.lore: Blood Axes feel no shame in retreating from a fight, particularly if the boss wants someone else duffed up.
stratagem.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Orks unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagem.name: KRUNCHIN’ DESCENT
stratagem.lore: With their rocket packs at full throttle, Stormboyz plummet to smash into their foes with bone‑crushing force.
stratagem.when: Your Charge phase, just after a Stormboyz unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagem.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagem.name: ON TO DA NEXT
stratagem.lore: Seeing little value in pursuing fleeing foes, Blood Axe mobs turn their attention towards the next fight or press towards whatever cache of shiny gubbinz the boss desires.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
stratagem.target: One Orks unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

stratagem.name: DED SNEAKY
stratagem.lore: Utilising camouflage, cover or misdirection, these Orks slip away to prepare their next ambush, leaving their foes staring at thin air.
stratagem.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Kommandos or Stormboyz unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
